name: confluence-cloud-mcp
description: Structured page editing, macro support, graph navigation, and session-based content management for Confluence Cloud

tools.name: manage_confluence_page
tools.description: Get, create, update, delete, move, copy, or pull pages for editing

tools.name: edit_confluence_content
tools.description: Structural content editing within an active editing session

tools.name: manage_confluence_space
tools.description: List spaces, get space details, or manage space configuration

tools.name: search_confluence
tools.description: Search using CQL, full-text, labels, or contributors

tools.name: manage_confluence_media
tools.description: Upload, download, list, or delete page attachments

tools.name: navigate_confluence
tools.description: Navigate page hierarchy, discover links, backlinks, and related pages

tools.name: queue_confluence_operations
tools.description: Batch multiple operations in a single call with result references
